title: An electric shaver device
abstract: The present invention relates to a hair shaving device, comprising: a cutter assembly having a rotatable cylinder, a plurality of elongated flat blades, fixed in and extending radially from said rotatable cylinder, a thin cutting sheet screen slotted with a matrix of apertures, part of said screen in contact with, and conforming to, part of the rotation surface of said cutter assembly, power means for rotating said cutter assembly about its axis; and a case, at one end of which is mounted said cutter and said screen, and within which is mounted said power means, wherein the orientation of the blades and the apertures creates a fixed cutting angle of less than 90 degrees.
claims: Claims 1. A hair shaving device, comprising: a cutter assembly having a rotatable cylinder, a plurality of elongated flat blades, fixed in and extending radially from said rotatable cylinder, a thin cutting sheet screen slotted with a matrix of apertures, part of said screen in contact with, and conforming to, part of the rotation surface of said cutter assembly, power means for rotating said cutter assembly about its axis; and a case, at one end of which is mounted said cutter and said screen, and within which is mounted said power means, wherein the orientation of the blades and the apertures creates a fixed cutting angle of less than 90 degrees. 2. A hair shaving device according to claim 1, in which an optimal fixed cutting angle is obtained by an acute angle between 30-60 degrees. 3. A hair shaving device according to claim 1, in which the blades are arranged in a spiral manner on the rotatable cylinder. 4. A hair shaving device according to claim 1, in which the slots of the screen create a diagonal pattern.
